name: Crab and Rocket Tart
recipeIngredient: 1 large handful of rocket (washed and dried)
5 fl oz creme fraiche or heavy cream
recipeInstructions:
1 Preheat the oven to 375F.
2 Bake a 7-inch pastry case blind for 15 minutes.
3 In a bowl, process the eggs and rocket. Add the creme fraiche or heavy cream, salt, and pepper.
4 Place the tart tin on a baking sheet. Spread the crab meat onto the baked pastry case and top with Parmesan cheese.
5 Pour the custard mixture over the crab and Parmesan.
6 Bake for 20-30 minutes.
7 Serve warm.
